name: Salmon Poached with Tomatoes and Swiss Chard
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the salmon fillet crossways into 6 pieces and remove any bones.
2. Season with salt and pepper; allow to stand for 20 minutes.
3. Separate the green leafy part from the central stems of Swiss chard.
4. Cut the greens into 1/4-inch strips and the stems into 1/8-inch strips.
5. Heat olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
6. Add onion, ginger, and chard stems; saute for 5 minutes.
7. Add chopped tomatoes and continue to saute for another 4-5 minutes.
8. Stir in coconut milk and water, then salt and pepper to taste.
9. Simmer over low heat for 1 minute.
10. Add the Swiss chard leaves.
11. Arrange fish in a single layer on top of the sauce.
12. Spoon some sauce over the fish.
13. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
14. Serve with fish and vegetables.
